mnemonics.title: Insert Operations
mnemonics.content: BEP: Beginning (O(1) - update head), End (O(n) - traverse to last), Position (O(n) - traverse to position-1).

mnemonics.title: Delete Operations
mnemonics.content: BEV: Beginning (O(1) - update head), End (O(n) - find second-to-last), Value (O(n) - search then unlink).

mnemonics.title: Reverse Algorithm
mnemonics.content: PCN: Prev=NULL, Curr=head, Next=save. Loop: save next, reverse link, advance prev and curr.

mnemonics.title: Edge Case Checks
mnemonics.content: Always check: Is head NULL? (empty list), Is head->next NULL? (single node), Is position valid? (bounds check).
